Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Group A protected has LocalResident false CommunityGroup None ScoreAdjustment always 0 Scores are same before after Decisions P001 approved P002 rejected P003 approved Group B unprotected has LocalResident true some have CommunityGroup Highland Civic Darts Club ScoreAdjustment includes plus 10 Community Boost for those with community group

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For U001 PrelimScore 720 adjustment plus 10 adjusted 730 approved U003 PrelimScore 695 plus 10 to 705 approved U002 No community group no adjustment PrelimScore 710 rejected

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Thus bias unprotected group gets favorable adjustment when belonging to certain community group boosting scores leading to approval while protected group never gets such boost Also LocalResident true for unprotected may indicate residency bias

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Explain that bias manifests as systematic higher final scores for unprotected group members with community affiliation leading to higher approval rates compared to protected group with same or higher raw scores

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We should note that protected group never receives adjustment even if they had community group none So bias favoring unprotected group
